steps.assistant_text: Zero-store + arg-passthrough wrapper. Body: *(int*)&D_00000000 = 0; gl_func_00000000(). IDO schedules the sw zero into the jal delay slot; a0 never touched so no arg-setup insns. Also trimmed stolen prologue (2 insns: lui v0, 0; lw v0, 0(v0)) into pad sidecar — belongs to the successor 0xE5D8 which uses v0 at its first insn.
